welcome.title: National Highway AI Monitoring Portal
welcome.ministry: Ministry of Road Transport and Highways
welcome.hero_desc: Empowering National Infrastructure with Real-time Defect Detection and Automated Resolution Protocols.
welcome.impact_title: Impact on Road Safety in India

impact_slides.title: 9,400+ Deaths Due to Potholes
impact_slides.text: According to the Ministry of Road Transport and Highways, potholes caused more than 9,400 deaths in India between 2020 and 2024.

impact_slides.title: 23,000+ Road Accidents
impact_slides.text: More than 23,000 accidents occurred due to potholes on Indian roads during the same period.

impact_slides.title: 20,000+ Injuries
impact_slides.text: Nearly 20,000 people were injured due to pothole-related accidents.

impact_slides.title: 53% Increase in Pothole Accidents
impact_slides.text: Pothole-related accidents have increased by 53% in the last five years, highlighting the urgent need for better road monitoring systems.

welcome.feature_desc_placeholder: Secured infrastructure monitoring utilizing deep learning algorithms and geospatial analytics.
welcome.footer_official: Official Portal of National Highways Authority of India (NHAI)

login.error_credentials: Invalid credentials or portal sync failure.
login.security_notice: Authorized personnel only. All access is logged and recorded by the National Highway Authority surveillance center.

settings.title: Portal Configuration
settings.desc: Manage your system preferences and security
settings.dark_mode_desc: Enable dark interface for night operations
settings.gps_desc: Allow portal to track your current position
settings.gps_warning: Disabling GPS will prevent "My Location" features from functioning on the map.
settings.notifications_desc: Real-time alerts for critical road damage

dashboard.visualization_desc: Aggregate data visualization for Maintenance & Security
dashboard.no_data: No structural defects detected in this sector

report.title: Report Road Anomaly
report.desc: Manual input for structural defects identification
report.err_fetch_loc: Unable to fetch location. Please enter manually.
report.err_permission_denied: Location permission denied. Please enable it in browser settings.
report.err_timeout: Location request timed out. Please try again.
report.err_not_supported: Geolocation is not supported by your browser.
report.capture_desc: Tap to open camera or upload road defect photo

map.title: Geospatial Surveillance
map.subtitle: Monitoring NH-Series India for structural integrity
